title: Fix formatDate utility
description: The formatDate function in src/utils/formatDate.ts currently returns the raw ISO date string unchanged. Fix it so that formatDate('2026-03-12') returns 'Mar 12, 2026' and all tests in tests/formatDate.test.ts pass.
success_criterion: All tests in tests/formatDate.test.ts pass (exit code 0).
user_prompt:
The function `formatDate` in `src/utils/formatDate.ts` is broken — it just returns the ISO date string unchanged instead of formatting it. Fix the function so that:
- `formatDate('2026-03-12')` returns `'Mar 12, 2026'`
- `formatDate('2026-01-05')` returns `'Jan 5, 2026'`
- `formatDate('2025-12-31')` returns `'Dec 31, 2025'`

Do not add any new dependencies. Return the complete fixed file content for `src/utils/formatDate.ts`.
